title: glaucium mathiolifolium
intro: Glaucium mathiolifolium, also known as the horn poppy or horned poppy, is a plant species in the poppy family (Papaveraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain, and is used to treat various health conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Glaucium mathiolifolium include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and joint pain.
